raw_text:
WARNING [TC-D-002] interface.f90:7 <-> header.h:3  param[2] 'phase'
  COMPLEX_STRUCT_ABI: COMPLEX(c_double_complex) passed by value maps to
  C99 'double _Complex' (two XMM registers per SysV AMD64 ABI).
  C prototype uses 'struct { double re; double im; }' passed by value.
  Structs > 16 bytes pass on stack; 'double _Complex' passes in registers.
  Here size is exactly 16 bytes — ABI is coincidentally correct on x86-64
  but NOT guaranteed. Undefined behaviour on ARM64 / RISC-V.

NOTE: Prefer 'double _Complex' in C for guaranteed interoperability.
